benchmark_case_name: Role Gap vs Loop Gap Classification (Runtime-Generated)
summary: The benchmark now has runtime-generated loop-trace evidence showing that the dominant miss type was loop refinement, not a missing-role pattern, and that the corrective work stayed aligned to loop expansion tasks.
notes: This verdict extends DG-003 from fixture-level loop traces into runtime-generated loop-classification evidence.
A complementary runtime-generated role-gap family still remains.
